description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular wooden enclosure with a rich, medium-brown wood grain finish. The front face displays two prominent circular speaker drivers: a large woofer at the bottom and a smaller tweeter above, both set in black surrounds. There is also a circular port or empty speaker slot above the woofer, likely for bass reflex or an additional driver. The rear panel is solid black with a single power or audio cable emerging from a central port, indicating its powered nature. The sides and top are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the natural wood texture. No visible controls, branding, or decorative elements are present on the exterior.
description: A rectangular wooden stereo sound system with a black front panel featuring two speaker drivers and a cable emerging from the back. The enclosure has a smooth wood grain finish and minimal external features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the smooth, uninterrupted wood grain surface and a cable trailing from the rear.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two circular speaker drivers, a port or empty slot, and the black speaker panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with the cable visible trailing from the back.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a solid black panel with a single cable emerging from a central port.
